items.caption: A dimly lit wine cellar features rows of wooden racks holding wine bottles.

A wooden wine rack with multiple rows of wine bottles. the rack has a series of curved wooden slats that support the bottles. the bottles are arranged in neat rows, with the labels facing outward. the bottles vary in color, indicating different types of wine. the background is blurred, but it appears to be a room with a window, suggesting that the rack is in a cellar or a wine storage area. the lighting is soft, casting gentle shadows on the rack and bottles.
